meta.name: Euro Stopper®
meta.description: Protective enclosure for manual call points
meta.heroTitle: Low-Profile Protective Enclosure with Optional Sounder
meta.heroDescription:
UV-stabilised polycarbonate enclosure designed to restrict unauthorised access to manual call points while maintaining operational access. Integrated Glow Guide reflective material which improves visibility in low-light conditions.

Available with optional sounder, relay output and multiple colour and marking configurations.

Suitable for installations where protection against false activation or misuse is required.

options.30: #30 Marked hood with sounder and relay
